title: BBQ Variety Meats
details: A delicious platter of BBQ meats served with fresh tomatoes and bell peppers.

title: Beef Kebab with Lavash
details: Juicy beef kebabs served with lavash, onions, and bulgur.

title: Chicken with Herbs
details: Roasted chicken seasoned with herbs and served with onions and lemons.

title: Club Sandwich & Fries
details: Classic club sandwich with cheese, tomato, and smoked meat served with fries.

title: Fish in Creamy Sauce
details: Tender fish fillet served in a rich creamy sauce with fresh vegetables.

title: Moroccan Sausage Stew
details: A flavorful Moroccan stew with sausages and aromatic spices.

title: Fried Chicken Breast
details: Crispy fried chicken breast served with vegetables and a rich sauce.

title: Stew Chicken & Veggies
details: A creamy stew with chicken, mushrooms, and fresh vegetables.

title: Shrimp Salad
details: Fresh shrimp salad with peaches, avocado, and lettuce.

title: Pad Thai Noodles
details: Classic Thai noodle dish with shrimp, tofu, and fresh herbs.

title: Pasta with Chicken & Veggies
details: Creamy pasta served with chicken, zucchini, and green peas.

title: Club Sandwich Special
details: A hearty club sandwich paired with crispy fries for a fulfilling meal.

title: Stew Chicken Deluxe
details: A deluxe version of stew chicken with premium vegetables and a savory sauce.
